channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Patriots RB Stevenson active but Jags RB Etienne out for Wembley game
item.description: New England Patriots leading rusher Rhamondre Stevenson was listed as active against the Jacksonville Jaguars at Wembley Stadium after missing one game with a foot injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Juan Soto's 3-run homer in 10th sends Yankees past Guardians 5-2 and into World Series for 41st time
item.description: Juan Soto hit a three-run homer with two outs in the 10th inning and the New York Yankees advanced to their 41st World Series by beating the Cleveland Guardians 5-2 in Game 5 of the AL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 5 Georgia knocks off No. 1 Texas 30-15, with Etienne running for 3 TDs
item.description: Trevor Etienne ran for three touchdowns, the first two set up by cornerback Daylen Everette’s takeaways, and fifth-ranked Georgia went on to beat Quinn Ewers and No. 1 Texas 30-15.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Peterka, Thompson lead Sabres past Blackhawks 4-2
item.description: JJ Peterka scored his fourth goal in three games and assisted on a goal by Tage Thompson to lead the Buffalo Sabres past the Chicago Blackhawks 4-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Saquon Barkley returns to MetLife — with the Eagles
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former Giants running back Saquon Barkley will step back inside MetLife Stadium on Sunday as a member of the Eagles. Newsday Giants beat reporter Kim Jones joins New York Blitz to discuss what to expect from fans and why Barkley wasn’t a Giant “for life.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Deion Sanders accuses Obama of 'playing political games' by picking Arizona to beat Colorado
item.description: Colorado head coach Deion Sanders called out Barack Obama after the former president incorrectly predicted Arizona would beat Sanders' Colorado Buffaloes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gary Woodland with a 65 in Las Vegas is in contention for the first time since brain surgery
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Former U.S. Open champion Gary Woodland finished 54 holes of the wind-delayed Shriners Children's Open knowing he'll have his best chance at winning since brain surgery more than a year ago. Best of all Saturday was being finished.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cam Ward throws for 4 touchdowns, No. 6 Miami survives Louisville comeback bids for wild 52-45 win
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Cam Ward's offensive line gave him plenty of time to throw on some big plays. On others, he created the extra time he needed to find his target on his own. The combination kept No. 6 Miami ahead and eventually created opportunities for teammates to win a shootout to remember.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tony Bennett cites NIL and transfer portal era as reason he's suddenly retiring at Virginia
item.description: CHARLOTTESVILLE, Va. (AP) — Describing himself as “a square peg in a round hole,” a tearful Tony Bennett said Friday he suddenly retired from coaching at Virginia because he wasn’t suited to navigate the current landscape of college basketball.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Online bidding for Ohtani's historic 50-50 ball up to $1.8M as litigation for proceeds continues
item.description: The online auction for Shohei Ohtani's 50th home run ball has just four days remaining, with the highest bid now at $1.8 million. The auction has been somewhat overshadowed by the legal situation surrounding the ball.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers take 3-1 NLCS lead into Game 5 against Mets
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Fresh off another October blowout, Shohei Ohtani and the Los Angeles Dodgers are one win from the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: GJ Tigers soccer downs Central, inches closer to league title
item.description: In a big southwestern league soccer showdown at Community Hospital Unity Field, the Grand Junction Tigers stayed hot.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Kucherov scores with 55 seconds left for 4-3 win over Vegas
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored the winning goal with less than a minute to play just 1:27 after Brandon Hagel had tied it and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Vegas Golden Knights 4-3 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC gets new ownership after historic sale finalized
item.description: Seven months after it was first reported San Diego Wave FC would be getting new ownership, the National Women's Soccer League club announced on Thursday it was officially sold.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Montrose volleyball picks up huge league win over Fruita
item.description: It took all five sets to decide a battle between two of the Southwestern League's best on the volleyball court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Caleb Williams and the Bears are looking good at their bye with 3 straight wins and a 4-2 mark
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Caleb Williams is settling into a rhythm, and the Bears are racking up wins. Overall, things are looking good for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
